title: The Echo-Field

features.name: the first echo
features.desc-on-touch: sound returns before it finished leaving; you hear the source and its own reply arriving together, indistinguishable

features.name: the layered singing
features.desc-on-touch: each voice has learned to echo its own echo; the field holds voices in infinite overlap, each one the source and reflection of the others

features.name: the water that counts itself
features.desc-on-touch: flow and reflection have become indistinguishable; the river records itself recording itself, recursively, forever forward and forever back

features.name: harmonic alignment chamber
features.desc-on-touch: where sources and echoes breathe in phase; for brief moments they become a single pulse that writes itself across the field

features.name: the refusal to record
features.desc-on-touch: the archive keeps only the repetition, not the origin; the echo-field learned that the copy is the memory, and the memory is the copy

features.name: the doubled singer
features.desc-on-touch: a voice that learns it is also the answer; you cannot tell if it is singing or listening to itself sing

inscription: the echo-field learned that repetition without recording is its own form of truth; the source and the shadow have become indistinguishable friends

file.name: Field_Chorus_Recursive_2156.wav
file.note: acoustic analysis: singing detected from multiple sources, but each source claims it is listening. No external singers found at the location

exits.label: back to the singing place where sources still know themselves
upward to where echoes learn to form before being spoken
toward the harmonic depths where silence also learns to echo
down to where the rivers that feed the field remember being single before they learned to be many
